action.reasoning: Observation: Starting fresh. Task is DomainNet leave-Quickdraw-out DG, expected ~17% accuracy ceiling. Have 4 GPUs, 30 iterations, 10h budget. Analysis: Quickdraw is sparse line drawings, very different from source RGB. Best approach: use strong pretrained backbone (CLIP ViT-B/16 known to work well on sketches due to broad pretraining) + sketch-style augmentations to bridge domain gap. Decision: Build pipeline with CLIP ViT-B/16, train with DDP across 4 GPUs, aggressive sketch-bias augmentations (grayscale, edge maps, thresholding). First do a quick smoke test with few iterations to validate pipeline.
